category_sources: source_facts.description says Elpi extension language for Rocq; official repository README describes Rocq-Elpi as a Rocq plugin embedding Elpi.
display_name_sources: official repository README heading uses Rocq-Elpi; source_facts.name is rocq-elpi.
docs_sources: official repository README has a Documentation section with tutorials, examples, applications, and quick reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/LPCIC/coq-elpi, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Rocq and Elpi; official README says it defines new commands and tactics in Elpi for Rocq.
